title: Scenario 09 Revocation Visibility / Split-State Boundary Delta Record

boundary_sequence.claim_state_after_transition: The validity-changing event is recorded in System A, but this does not establish visibility or consumption in System B.
System B's stale or partial local state does not establish current validity for System C.
Downstream reliance on stale or partial state is recorded as requiring visibility, consumption, synchronization, or current revalidation support.

fork_role: Fork records revocation visibility and split-state boundary state without approving, certifying, scoring, authorizing, determining compliance, determining admissibility, establishing legal sufficiency, deciding acceptance, judging correctness, or deciding negligence or excuse.
